KPI Bluebook

Key Performance Indicators:

  • Ethylene Yield Percentage
  • Propylene to Ethylene (P/E) Ratio
  • Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day)
  • Specific Steam Consumption (ton/ton)
  • Energy Intensity Index (EII)
  • Cooling Water Delta-T (°C)
  • Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
  • Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
  • Pump Vibration Anomaly Rate
  • Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate (LTIFR)
  • SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m³)
  • Flare Gas Recovery Rate
  • Polymer Melt Flow Index (MFI) Variance
  • On-Spec Production Percentage
  • Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton)
  • Maintenance to Operating Cost Ratio
KPI Bluebook
  • Ethylene Yield Percentage
  • View page source

Ethylene Yield Percentage

\[\text{}\]
Open in: VS Code PyCharm
Description
  • The Ethylene Yield Percentage measures the efficiency of a petrochemical plant's steam cracker in converting feedstock into ethylene
  • which is a primary product in the industry
Objective
  • The objective of this KPI is to assess how effectively the plant is utilizing its feedstock to produce ethylene
  • thereby indicating operational efficiency
Formula

The yield percentage is calculated by taking the amount of ethylene produced and dividing it by the total volume of feedstock used, then multiplying the result by 100 to express it as a percentage.

$$ \mathit{Yield\,Percentage} = \frac{\mathit{Ethylene\,Produced\,Tons}}{\mathit{Feedstock\,Volume\,Tons}} \times \mathit{100} $$
  • Ethylene Produced Tons: The numerator of the fraction.
  • Feedstock Volume Tons: The denominator of the fraction.
Used in KPI(s)
  • This KPI is used in various performance assessments within the petrochemical sector to evaluate production efficiency and optimize operations
Input Measure
  • The input measures for this KPI include the total volume of feedstock processed and the total amount of ethylene produced
Unit of Measure %
Reporting Source The data for this KPI is typically sourced from production logs and operational reports generated by the plant's data management systems.
Comments A higher Ethylene Yield Percentage indicates better performance and efficiency in the production process, while a lower percentage may signal issues that need to be addressed.

Code Context

 1:emphasize-lines: 5
 2
 3
 4def calculate_ethylene_yield(feedstock_volume_tons: float, ethylene_produced_tons: float) -> float:
 5 """Calculates the percentage yield of ethylene from a given amount of feedstock."""
 6 if feedstock_volume_tons == 0:
 7     return 0.0
 8 # KPI: Ethylene Yield Percentage
 9 # Measures the efficiency of the steam cracker in converting feedstock to the primary product.
10 yield_percentage = (ethylene_produced_tons / feedstock_volume_tons) * 100
11 return yield_percentage
